issues.title: Enemy dealt 40 dmg (58% of 69 HP) on floor 6 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 6, encounter 2, turn 18 (seq 465), the enemy dealt 40 damage which is 58% of the player's 69 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for this enemy type.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 35 dmg (81% of 43 HP) on floor 6 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 6, encounter 2, turn 19 (seq 469), the enemy dealt 35 damage which is 81% of the player's 43 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for this enemy type.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 46 dmg (100% of 46 HP) on floor 6 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 6, encounter 2, turn 20 (seq 473), the enemy dealt 46 damage which is 100% of the player's 46 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for this enemy type.

issues.title: 3 consecutive easy encounters (floors 2-2): HP stayed above 90
issues.description: 3 consecutive encounters where player ended with HP > 90. Encounters: F2E0:98HP, F2E1:96HP, F2E2:93HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or reduce healing on early floors.

issues.title: 3 consecutive easy encounters (floors 5-6): HP stayed above 90
issues.description: 3 consecutive encounters where player ended with HP > 90. Encounters: F5E2:96HP, F6E0:92HP, F6E1:100HP. The game may not be challenging enough in this stretch.
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or reduce healing on early floors.

issues.title: Player defeated despite 77% accuracy: attrition death
issues.description: The player was defeated on floor 6 with an overall accuracy of 77%. High-accuracy players should have a fair chance of survival; this suggests the damage/healing balance is too punishing.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce enemy damage scaling or increase healing from correct answers.

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 1: 9 turns vs prev floor avg 3.7 (2.5x)
issues.description: Encounter 1 on floor 3 (enemy: crystal_golem, common) took 9 turns to resolve, which is 2.5x the previous floor's average of 3.7 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold and indicates a difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floors or reduce this enemy's HP/damage.

issues.title: Floor 3 enc 2: 8 turns vs prev floor avg 3.7 (2.2x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 (enemy: magma_core, boss) took 8 turns to resolve, which is 2.2x the previous floor's average of 3.7 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold and indicates a difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floors or reduce this enemy's HP/damage.

issues.title: Floor 6 enc 2: 20 turns vs prev floor avg 6.3 (3.2x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 6 (enemy: the_curator, boss) took 20 turns to resolve, which is 3.2x the previous floor's average of 6.3 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold and indicates a difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floors or reduce this enemy's HP/damage.

issues.title: HP dropped from 100 to 8 in floor 6 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 6, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 to 8. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.
issues.suggestedFix: Add damage caps per encounter or provide emergency healing at low HP.
